card_status_alert: CLOSED to new applicants per LendingTree. Existing cardholders continue to use.
_review_reason: Card no longer accepts new applications. No recurring annual statement credits — value is purely earning structure (3x supermarkets up to $6k, 2x gas, 50% point bonus on 30+ tx/cycle). Recommend OpenCard catalog mark this card as legacy/closed-to-new.
